parameters.columns: channel, error_message, error_stack, payload, retry_count, created_at
message_id, user_id, channel, text, media, ts, context, metadata

parameters.functionCode: const p = $input.first().json;\nreturn [{ json: { channel: p.channel, message_id: p.message_id, sender_id: p.sender_id, text: p.text, hash: p.hash } }];

meta.description: InitCore v1.0 — Adapter WhatsApp vía Twilio. Valida X-Twilio-Signature (HMAC-SHA1), extrae From/Body/MediaUrl0..N y llama al workflow core_normalization mediante Execute Workflow con reintentos exponenciales (3 intentos).
